name: Viewer
description: Adds a lightweight viewer for task artifacts and reports.

skills.summary: Decides when the local viewer should be used.

agents.summary: Owns the viewer recipe orchestration inside the bundle.

tools.summary: Serve tasks.html with task data API.

scenarios.name: Launch Viewer
scenarios.summary: Prepare the local task viewer run plan.
scenarios.description: Expose the local viewer scenario through manifest metadata without requiring orchestration internals.
use_when: Need to inspect task artifacts in a browser.
Need a local preview before editing task data.
avoid_when: A local network listener is not allowed.
The environment cannot expose a local HTTP port.
